E1_source_audit.facsimile_vs_font: facsimile-derived bbox metadata only; NO modern-font glyphs used as evidence

relative_size.source: bbox area / within-doc median (scale-confounded across docs)

stroke_count.source: SOURCE_BLOCKED: requires glyph tracings; not in snapshot

orientation.source: SOURCE_BLOCKED: bbox is axis-aligned; no rotation angle

contour_embedding.source: SOURCE_BLOCKED (E2b): requires raster/vector glyph; drawings not scraped

E3_calibration.cross_script_stroke_to_identity: SOURCE_BLOCKED (no LB / Cypriot glyph geometry in any input)
E3_calibration.interpretation: channel does not exceed generic aspect/size similarity; it IS that similarity

verdict: SHAPE_CHANNEL_SOURCE_BLOCKED_FOR_STROKES; bbox-aspect channel has NO sign-identity power
